stemHtml: What are the advantages of using the Index method to determine moments? It..

options.a: reduces the magnitude of moments, making it less time-consuming to compute.
options.b: regroups different loading zones in single indexes, reducing the complexity of the load and trim sheet.
options.c: is digitalised and can be automatically uploaded to the aircraft FMC to determine stabiliser trim.
options.d: directly produces the position of the CG and the stabiliser trim setting.
